Bash(ruby << 'RUBY'
proj_path = '/Users/fengwang/Documents/trae_projects/beidanci/ios/beidanci.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj'
content = File.read\(proj_path\)

# Generate unique IDs \(must be 24 hex chars\)
file_ref_id = "AA0001000000000000000001"
build_file_id = "AA0001000000000000000002"

# 1. Add PBXBuildFile entry \(after the AppDelegate.mm build file line\)
build_file_line = "\\t\\t#{build_file_id} /* SpeechModule.m in Sources */ = {isa = PBXBuildFile; fileRef = #{file_ref_id} /* SpeechModule.m */; };"
content.sub!\(
  /^\(\\t\\t13B07FBC1A68108700A75B9A \\/\\* AppDelegate\\.mm in Sources \\*\\/.*\)$/,
  "\\\\1\\n#{build_file_line}"
\)

# 2. Add PBXFileReference entry \(after the AppDelegate.mm file reference\)
file_ref_line = "\\t\\t#{file_ref_id} /* SpeechModule.m */ = {isa = PBXFileReference; fileEncoding = 4; lastKnownFileType = sourcecode.c.objc; name = SpeechModule.m; path = beidanci/SpeechModule.m; sourceTree = \\"<group>\\"; };"
content.sub!\(
  /^\(\\t\\t13B07FB01A68108700A75B9A \\/\\* AppDelegate\\.mm \\*\\/ = \\{isa = PBXFileReference.*\)$/,
  "\\\\1\\n#{file_ref_line}"
\)

# 3. Add to PBXGroup children \(after AppDelegate.mm in the group\)
content.sub!\(
  /^\(\\t\\t\\t\\t13B07FB01A68108700A75B9A \\/\\* AppDelegate\\.mm \\*\\/,\)$/,
  "\\\\1\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t#{file_ref_id} /* SpeechModule.m */,"
\)

# 4. Add to PBXSourcesBuildPhase \(after AppDelegate.mm in Sources\)
content.sub!\(
  /^\(\\t\\t\\t\\t13B07FBC1A68108700A75B9A \\/\\* AppDelegate\\.mm in Sources \\*\\/,\)$/,
  "\\\\1\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t#{build_file_id} /* SpeechModule.m in Sources */,"
\)

File.write\(proj_path, content\)
puts "Added SpeechModule.m to Xcode project"
RUBY)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
v1.3.0: 大版本更新 - 广告页/语法Tab/词库扩展/例句优化

- 新增 SplashScreen 广告宣传页（开发者介绍、功能亮点、数据统计）
- 新增 GrammarScreen 语法独立Tab（从词库子标签提升为底部导航）
- 登录流程简化：去掉SMS验证码，手机号直接作为本地学习ID
- iPad键盘适配：ScrollView + keyboardShouldPersistTaps
- 数据迁移修复：mergeWithDefaults 防止旧数据缺字段崩溃
- 词库扩展：99→148个词根，3272→3467个词汇
- 例句优化：新增2376个日常生活场景例句+准确中文翻译
- 清理wordEnrichment中1198个无效翻译
- 移除LaunchScreen启动动画文字
- 深色模式全面支持
- TypeScript编译通过，Bundle构建通过

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
